canonical_name: that well from which you will not drink
the Virgin Huntress, blessing the Horned One
Great Raven ... Lady of death and life
the enemy rising on two legs
the one called by the Lady for that ancient sacrifice
any other facing that last testing
champion of Avalon, and challenge the betrayer
son to Avalon and to the spring fires
a king of the Avalon line
other realms which are not within this world at all
one greater than I who shall help us both to your testing
she who works, silently and alone, at the heart of nature
a wood gilded with the first buds of spring
the solid earth of the hazel grove
